subcodes.first_line: O thou who art rejoiced at the explanation of the maidservant of God...! Thank thou God... It behooveth him to seek only the divine bounties... ...As to the critical period (1901): Know though, that verily, Abdu'l-Baha dominates every critical period
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @light and darkness, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the human soul at midpoint of creation; the isthmus [barzakh], @power of the mind over nature
